headline: Abbott partially aligns with your stated priorities on housing, healthcare, and taxes.
agreements: Housing: Abbott’s platform backs deregulation and faster permitting to boost supply, partially matching your call for more housing.
Healthcare: His public statements favor keeping a market-based, state-flexible system rather than federal single-payer, partially matching your wish to retain the current mix.
Taxes: His official platform centers on large property-tax cuts, partially overlapping your openness to current levels.
caveat: Evidence comes from campaign platforms and public statements, not from detailed legislative text.
evidence_note: Evidence is chiefly Abbott’s 2025 State of the State address and campaign documents, giving high confidence in stated positions but not in enacted outcomes.
